basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Silchar is recruiting 01 Project Assistant with B.E./ B.Tech qualification. Last date of application is 15 July 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

age_limit.age_details: Technology Innovation Hub, Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (TIH-IITG)

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 35 Years (as on the closing date of application) | relaxation: Relaxation in age and qualification for SC/ ST/ OBC/ Women/ PwD as per Government of India rules.
qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B. Tech. or M. Tech. (Pre-Final Year) from Science/ Engineering/ Technology stream with knowledge in CAD and ANSYS.

how_to_apply: Applicants are requested to submit the signed scanned copy of their filled-up application form along with C.V. and all other relevant documents to the Principal Investigator through email at [email protected] with the subject line "Application for the post of 'Project Assistant' under TIH-IITG project TIH/TD/1005".
Call letters for shortlisted candidates will be sent via email. Candidates have to submit No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their current employer/institute at the time of interview or joining.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project duration. Selected candidates shall have to sign an agreement at the time of joining. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview details via email.

content_sections.text: NIT Silchar is recruiting 01 Project Assistant with B.E./ B.Tech qualification. Last date of application is 15 July 2026.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_silchar: Design, Development, and Performance Analysis of a Diffuser-augmented Low-head Archimedes Screw Hydrokinetic Turbine
Technology Innovation Hub, Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (TIH-IITG)
6 months initially and extendable up to 12 more months (subject to performance and funds)
Rs. 20,000/- per month (No HRA if institute accommodation is provided)

rows.details: 35 Years (as on the closing date of application)
B.E. / B. Tech. or M. Tech. (Pre-Final Year) from Science/ Engineering/ Technology stream with knowledge in CAD and ANSYS.
B. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering and Fluency in English language.
Relaxation in age and qualification for SC/ ST/ OBC/ Women/ PwD as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Silchar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applicants are requested to submit the signed scanned copy of their filled-up application form along with C.V. and all other relevant documents to the Principal Investigator through email at [email protected] with the subject line "Application for the post of 'Project Assistant' under TIH-IITG project TIH/TD/1005" . Call letters for shortlisted candidates will be sent via email. Candidates have to submit No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their current employer/institute at the time of interview or joining.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project duration. Selected candidates shall have to sign an agreement at the time of joining. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview details via email.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Silchar Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application for NIT Silchar Project Assistant Recruitment is 15th July 2026. Interested candidates must send their application via email to the Principal Investigator before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: There is only 01 vacancy available for the post of Project Assistant under the TIH-IITG project (Sanction No. TIH/TD/1005).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Assistant at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month. No House Rent Allowance (HRA) will be provided if institute accommodation is allotted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for NIT Silchar Project Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have B.E./B.Tech or M.Tech (Pre-Final Year) in Science/Engineering/Technology stream with knowledge of CAD and ANSYS. B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering is desirable. The maximum age limit is 35 years as on the closing date, with relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD candidates as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for NIT Silchar Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates should send the signed scanned copy of the filled application form along with CV and all relevant documents to [email protected] with the subject line “Application for the post of ‘Project Assistant’ under TIH-IITG project TIH/TD/1005”. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is the Project Assistant position permanent?
faq.answer: No. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the duration of the project. It may be extended up to a maximum of 18 months depending upon satisfactory performance and availability of funds.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to apply for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit a duly filled application form, detailed CV, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their current employer/institute (to be produced at the time of interview or joining).
